backstory.original: Tatyana is an air-genasi barbarian gladiator, towering near seven feet tall, who earned her stripes in the fighting pits of Koshmarr. The talons of Falkovnia taught her the power of the bear totem, and the spirits of the mist connected her to the natural druidic world through the power of the moon. She is a fierce guardian of all who show her respect, is curious and bold, quick to fight but quick to forgive. Some see this giant blue weightless warrior as a bit of an 'air-head' but those who know this lightness comes from a deep knowledge that the moment is all we have, and death may lurk around any corner.
backstory.display: 塔季扬娜是一名气元素裔野蛮人角斗士。她身形高大，接近七尺，在科什马尔的角斗坑里赢得了累累功勋。“鹰巢利爪”教会了她如何运用熊之图腾的力量，而浓雾之灵以明月之力让她与自然的德鲁伊界域连接起来。若是向她表达敬意，她便会成为一位凶猛的守护者；充满好奇心的她奋勇出击，在战斗中一马当先，但也能一笑泯恩仇。有些人觉得这位高大却轻盈的蓝色战士脑子里“装了太多空气”，但这份潇洒飘逸源于一种深刻的认识：我们活在当下，而死亡也许会不期而至。

description.original: Tatyana strikes at the closest enemy with two Kukri strikes.
description.display: 塔季扬娜使用反曲刀攻击最近的敌人两次。

longDescription.original: Tatyana strikes at the closest enemy with two Kukri strikes.
longDescription.display: 塔季扬娜使用反曲刀攻击最近的敌人两次。

description.original: Entangling roots appear, dealing damage to enemies within while reducing their damage.
description.display: 召唤缠绕根须，对被根须覆盖的敌人造成伤害并降低他们的伤害。

longDescription.original: A stripe of entangling roots appears to the right of the front column, dealing damage to all enemies inside it, and all enemies that enter it during its duration. Enemies standing in the roots deal 50% less damage. The roots last for 30 seconds.
longDescription.display: 一丛缠绕根须出现在阵型最前排的右边，对被覆盖的所有敌人及根须持续时间内进入其中的敌人造成伤害。站在根须丛中的敌人伤害降低 50%。根须持续存在 30 秒。

description.original: Tatyana buffs the damage of a random Champion in the middle of the formation, specializations can spread this in different ways.
description.display: 塔季扬娜提高阵型中央一位随机勇士的伤害，可通过选择不同专精为此技能增加各种效果。

description.original: If Tatyana has not been attacked recently she leaves to find snacks, bringing back some additional enemies as well.
description.display: 如果塔季扬娜在一段时间内没有被敌人攻击到，她就会去找点小零食，同时会带回一些额外的敌人。

conditions.desc: A random slot from the middle columns of the formation is chosen. $(source_hero) increases the damage of the Champion in that slot and adjacent to it by $(amount)%.
A random slot from the middle columns of the formation is chosen. $(source_hero) increases the damage of the Champion in that slot and in the same column as it by $(amount)%.
A random slot from the middle columns of the formation is chosen. $(source_hero) increases the damage of the Champion in that slot by $(amount)%.
从该阵型的中间列中选择一个随机格子。$(source_hero)可以将该格子中以及与其相邻的格子中勇士的伤害提升 $(amount)%。
从该阵型的中间列中选择一个随机格子。$(source_hero)可以将该格子中以及与其同列的格子中勇士的伤害提升 $(amount)%。
从该阵型的中间列中选择一个随机格子。$(source_hero)可以将该格子中勇士的伤害提升 $(amount)%。

tipText.original: Tatyana buffs the damage of a randomly chosen champion in the middle columns of the formation
tipText.display: 塔季扬娜提高阵型中央一位随机勇士的伤害

description.desc: $(source_hero) increases the health of all other Champions by $(amount)% of her max health.
$(source_hero)增加其他所有勇士的生命值，数值相当于她最大生命值的 $(amount)%。

Each time $(source_hero) is attacked, she gains one Fury stack. The effect of Faithful Friend is increased by $(amount)% for each Fury stack, stacking additively and then applying multiplicatively. She loses $(amount___2)% of her Fury stacks every $(time___2) seconds that she is not attacked. Caps at $(max_stacks) stacks.
$(source_hero)每次被攻击时获得一层狂怒堆叠层数，每层堆叠将提升忠诚之友的效果 $(amount)%（以加算方式堆叠，并以乘算方式生效）。未被攻击时，她每 $(time___2) 秒失去 $(amount___2)% 狂怒堆叠层数。最高堆叠 $(max_stacks) 层。

description.pre: If $(source_hero) is not attacked for $(time) seconds, and the players are in a non-boss area with no barriers, she briefly runs ahead off the right side of the screen. She returns $(offscreen_time) seconds later from the right side with $(tatyana_find_a_feast_range) additional enemies that simultaneously spawn. After she returns, the $(time) seconds counter starts again from 0 seconds.
如果$(source_hero)在 $(time) 秒内未受到攻击，并且玩家当前处于没有路障的非首领区域，那么她就会快速跑出屏幕右侧。她会在 $(offscreen_time) 秒钟后从右侧返回，同时刷新 $(tatyana_find_a_feast_range) 名额外的敌人。她回来后，$(time) 秒的计数器将再次从 0 秒开始计时。

conditions.desc: ^^最低刷新敌人数：$(tatyana_find_a_feast_range_min)^刷新额外敌人的几率：$(tatyana_find_a_feast_range_extra_chance)%

tipText.original: If Tatyana has not been attacked recently she grabs some snacks and brings back some extra enemies to fight
tipText.display: 如果塔季扬娜在一段时间内没有被敌人攻击到，她就会去找点小零食，同时会带回一些额外的敌人

description.desc: When $(source_hero) reaches $(amount___2)+ Fury stacks, and for every $(time___2) seconds she's above $(amount___2)+ Fury stacks, she gets a Rage stack, up to $(max_stacks) Rage stacks. With at least 1 Rage stack, she rages and her base attack changes. For each Rage stack, Faithful Friend gets a $(amount)% bonus, stacking multiplicatively. If she goes below $(amount___2) Fury stacks, she loses all Rage stacks.

$(source_hero)的狂怒堆叠层数达到 $(amount___2) 层以上之后，或是每次堆叠狂怒层数 $(amount___2) 层以上超过 $(time___2) 秒，她会获得一层暴怒堆叠层数，最高不超过 $(max_stacks) 层。只要有一层暴怒堆叠层数，她的怒气和基本攻击就会发生改变。每获得一层暴怒堆叠，忠诚之友就会获得 $(amount)% 加成（以乘算方式叠加）。在狂怒堆叠层数低于 $(amount___2) 时，她失去所有暴怒堆叠层数。

name.display: 你的朋友就是我的朋友

description.desc: $(source_hero)'s Faithful Friend now affects all Champions in slots adjacent to the Faithful Friend slot, and the effect is increased by $(amount)%.
$(source_hero)的忠诚之友现在对与忠诚之友格子相邻的所有勇士生效，技能效果增加 $(amount)%。

specializationName.display: 你的朋友就是我的朋友

specializationDescription.original: Tatyana focuses her love in a circle of friends
specializationDescription.display: 塔季扬娜将她的爱意倾注于一圈伙伴身上

description.desc: $(source_hero)'s Faithful Friend now affects all Champions in the column containing the Faithful Friend slot, and the effect is increased by $(amount)%.
$(source_hero)的忠诚之友现在对与忠诚之友格子同列的所有勇士生效，技能效果增加 $(amount)%。

specializationDescription.original: Tatyana focuses her love in a line of friends
specializationDescription.display: 塔季扬娜将她的爱意倾注于一排伙伴身上

description.desc: $(source_hero)'s Faithful Friend continues to only affect one slot, however the effect is increased by $(amount)%.
$(source_hero)的忠诚之友仍然只对一个格子生效，然而效果增加 $(amount)%。

specializationDescription.original: Tatyana focuses on her only friend
specializationDescription.display: 塔季扬娜只专注于一位伙伴

upgrades.effectReference: {"effect_string":"buff_upgrade,100,7385","description":"Increases the number of enemies spawned by $(upgrade_hero id)'s $(upgrade_name id) by $(amount)%"}

description.original: I will go first -- you are small and squishy.
description.display: 我走前边--你们这些软塌塌的小个子。

description.original: You and I, we stand together!
You have not seen me angry yet!
description.display: 你还没见识过我生气的样子呢！

description.original: Here's what I learned from the Talons of Falkovnia!
description.display: 让你看看鹰巢利爪教会了我什么！

description.original: Don't worry, I bring some for everyone!
description.display: 别担心，我会给大家都带点回来的！

effects.description: Increases the number of enemies spawned by Tatyana's Find a Feast by $amount%

description.original: You watch me fight -- is fun AND educational!
description.display: 好好看着我怎么战斗的--不但有趣，更有教育意义！

description.original: You are perhaps almost as good a fighter as me?
description.display: 也许你差不多和我一样是个好战士？

description.original: Look -- when I flex like this, it looks like the bear is talking!
description.display: 看--当我这样弯曲时，看起来像是熊在说话！

description.original: I will take their faces off!
Now we fight! Shoulder to shoulder!
You, follow me. Anything I don't take out in one hit is yours.
description.display: 你们，跟我来。一击不死的任何敌人都交给你们了。

character_sheet_details.backstory: Tatyana is an air-genasi barbarian gladiator, towering near seven feet tall, who earned her stripes in the fighting pits of Koshmarr. The talons of Falkovnia taught her the power of the bear totem, and the spirits of the mist connected her to the natural druidic world through the power of the moon. She is a fierce guardian of all who show her respect, is curious and bold, quick to fight but quick to forgive. Some see this giant blue weightless warrior as a bit of an 'air-head' but those who know this lightness comes from a deep knowledge that the moment is all we have, and death may lurk around any corner.
character_sheet_details.system_description: Tatyana is a Support Tank that picks a random friend to buff
